username.description: Avni account username, sent via HTTP Basic auth.

password.description: Avni account password, sent via HTTP Basic auth. Never logged.

base_url.description: Avni API base URL override for tests, proxies, or self-hosted instances.

start_date.description: Optional RFC3339 lower bound sent as the start_date query parameter on every request.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
